title: Task: Review the claim 'claude/skills が正本のはず'. Inspect local loader and adapter evidence only. Determine whether current tooling treats ~/.claude/skills as authoritative for Claude, Codex, both, or neither. Look for contradictions or drift risks. Do not edit files. Return findings first with file re...
summary_text: **Findings** 1. **High**: 現行の「正本(SSOT)」は `~/.claude/skills` ではなく、リポジトリ側の SSOT + マニフェストです。`AGENTS.md` が active FUGUE の SSOT と明記され、skills は baseline manifest と sync script 管理になっています。 Refs: [AGENTS.md:3](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/AGENTS.md#L3), [AGENTS.md:5](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/AGENTS.md#L5), [docs/agents/shared-skills.md:1](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/shared-skills.md#L1), [docs/agents/shared-skills.md:7](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/shared-skills.md#L7), [docs/agents/shared-skills.md:23](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/shared-skills.md#L23) 2. **High**: Codex 側ローダーは `~/.claude/skills` を authority として扱っていません。`codex-skill-launch` は `./.codex/skills` / `${HOME}/.codex/skills` を探索し、launcher installer/test も `.codex` 系だけを前提にしています。 Refs: [scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch:56](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch#L56), [scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch:59](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch#L59), [scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:29](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L29), [scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:251](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh#L251), [tests/test-codex-skill-launch.sh:10](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-codex-skill-launch.sh#L10) 3. **Medium**: ただし Claude 側の一部運用（legacy/eval）は `~/.claude/skills` 直参照です。skill-eval 定義や quick-reference の委譲コマンドは `~/.claude/skills/...` を前提にしています。 Refs: [scripts/eval/defs/x-auto.yaml:2](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/defs/x-auto.yaml#L2), [scripts/eval/defs/note-generate.yaml:2](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/defs/note-generate.yaml#L2), [scripts/eval/defs/bookkeeping.yaml:2](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/defs/bookkeeping.yaml#L2), [docs/agents/quick-reference.md:9](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/quick-reference.md#L9) 4. **Medium (drift risk)**: 同期方針は「Codex/Claude 同期」ですが、恒常的な parity 強制は見えず、`--target` 運用依存です。加えて OpenClaw sync は `openclaw-<skill>` で配置する一方、manifest/profile は `github` 等の素名を使っており、呼び出し名の混線リスクがあります。 Refs: [scripts/skills/sync-openclaw-skills.sh:12](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-openclaw-skills.sh#L12), [scripts/skills/sync-openclaw-skills.sh:144](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/skills/sync-openclaw-skills.sh#L144), [config/skills/fugue-openclaw-baseline.tsv:2](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/skills/fugue-openclaw-baseline.tsv#L2), [docs/fugue-skills-profile.md:32](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/fugue-skills-profile.md#L32), [scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch:52](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/launchers/codex-skill-launch#L52) 5. **Medium (contradiction risk)**: peripheral adapter 定義に「preferred_lane=claude」なのに実体 path が `~/.codex/skills/...` な箇所があり、運用判断と資産配置がねじれています。 Refs: [config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json:224](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json#L224), [config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json:226](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json#L226) **Conclusion** `~/.claude/skills` は「Claude の一部 legacy/eval フローでは実行上の参照先」ですが、現行 tooling 全体の authoritative SSOT ではありません。判定は **Claude-only の一部運用で参照されるが、Codex の authority ではなく、全体 SSOT としては neither（SSOT は AGENTS + skills manifest）** です。
